info.title: Clash Royale API
info.description: Check out Getting Started for instructions and links to other resources. Clash Royale API uses JSON Web Tokens for authorizing the requests. Tokens are created by developers on My Account page and must be passed in every API request in Authorization HTTP header using Bearer authentication scheme. Correct Authorization header looks like this: "Authorization: Bearer API_TOKEN".

InMaintenanceSpec.description: Service is temprorarily unavailable because of maintenance.

UnknownExceptionSpec.description: Unknown error happened when handling the request.

RequestThrottledSpec.description: Request was throttled, because amount of requests was above the threshold defined for the used API token.

ForbiddenSpec.description: Access denied, either because of missing/incorrect credentials or used API token does not grant access to the requested resource.

BadRequestSpec.description: Client provided incorrect parameters for the request.

get.description: Get list of available cards

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Limit the number of items returned in the response.

parameters.name: after
parameters.description: Return only items that occur after this marker. Before marker can be found from the response, inside the 'paging' property. Note that only after or before can be specified for a request, not both.

parameters.name: before
parameters.description: Return only items that occur before this marker. Before marker can be found from the response, inside the 'paging' property. Note that only after or before can be specified for a request, not both.

get.description: Get current events. Returns a list of ongoing events with its Title and Description localized.

Get information about a single player by player tag. Player tags can be found either in game or by from clan member lists. Note that player tags start with hash character '#' and that needs to be URL-encoded properly to work in URL, so for example player tag '#2ABC' would become '%232ABC' in the URL.

parameters.name: playerTag
parameters.description: Tag of the player.

get.description: Search all clans by name and/or filtering the results using various criteria. At least one filtering criteria must be defined and if name is used as part of search, it is required to be at least three characters long It is not possible to specify ordering for results so clients should not rely on any specific ordering as that may change in the future releases of the API.

parameters.name: name
parameters.description: Search clans by name. If name is used as part of search query, it needs to be at least three characters long. Name search parameter is interpreted as wild card search, so it may appear anywhere in the clan name.

parameters.name: locationId
parameters.description: Filter by clan location identifier. For list of available locations, refer to getLocations operation.

parameters.name: minMembers
parameters.description: Filter by minimum number of clan members

parameters.name: maxMembers
parameters.description: Filter by maximum number of clan members

parameters.name: minScore
parameters.description: Filter by minimum amount of clan score.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Limit the number of items returned in the response.

parameters.name: after
parameters.description: Return only items that occur after this marker. Before marker can be found from the response, inside the 'paging' property. Note that only after or before can be specified for a request, not both.

parameters.name: before
parameters.description: Return only items that occur before this marker. Before marker can be found from the response, inside the 'paging' property. Note that only after or before can be specified for a request, not both.
